netError.offline: You appear to be offline. Please check your connection and try again.
netError.network: Couldn't reach the server. Please check your connection and try again.
netError.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
netError.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
netError.forbidden: You don't have permission to do this.
netError.server: The server ran into a problem. Please try again in a moment.
netError.parse: We received an unexpected response. Please try again.
netError.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

root.title: DaDiary — Your skin diary · Friendly AI skincare buddy every day
root.description: Personal skin diary + a friendly AI skincare buddy: daily photo check-ins, simple morning & evening routines, and clear personalized tips. Long-term before/after and your skincare shelf — supportive, evidence-friendly, encouraging. Built to scale regions and weather, not locked to one country.

checkIn.title: Skin check-in · DaDiary
checkIn.description: Photos + how your skin feels today — your AI buddy gives kind feedback: what's going well, small next steps, plus sunscreen / barrier reminders.

onboarding.title: Get to know your skin · DaDiary
onboarding.description: Three quick steps: photos & skin, your preferences, then a personalized AM/PM starter routine.

progress.title: See how your skin changes · DaDiary
progress.description: Your check-in timeline and before/after view — long-term trends, gentle gauges, and weekly nudges.

cabinet.title: Skincare shelf · DaDiary
cabinet.description: Track products you use — synced with your AI buddy so affiliate picks skip items you already own.

meMemory.title: What your buddy remembers · DaDiary
meMemory.description: See the memory block injected into AI coaching — transparent and refreshable.

login.title: Sign in · DaDiary
login.description: Sign in to save your check-ins, skin profile, and skincare shelf.

register.title: Sign up · DaDiary
register.description: Create an account — get to know your skin and receive a starter routine from your AI buddy.

coachWelcome.title: Your starter routine · DaDiary
coachWelcome.description: See your personalized morning/evening routine, safety notes, and rate your AI buddy.

routine.title: Morning & evening skincare · DaDiary
routine.description: Build your morning & evening skincare — edit, reorder, and tick steps daily.

feedbackPage.title: Send feedback · DaDiary
feedbackPage.description: Share opinions, report bugs, or suggest features during Beta.

adminFeedbacks.title: Manage feedback · DaDiary Admin
adminFeedbacks.description: Review and triage user feedback during Beta.

auth.loginSub: Use your email and password to check in and save your skin profile.
auth.registerSub: After sign-up you'll go through getting to know your skin — save your skin type and get a starter routine from your AI buddy.
auth.errorGeneric: Something didn't work. Check your details or that the backend is running.
auth.captchaRequired: Finish the security check below, then try signing up again.
auth.captchaFailed: The security check did not pass — please try again.
auth.captchaUnavailable: We could not verify the security check right now. Try again in a moment.
auth.captchaHint: Quick check to prevent automated sign-ups — usually one tap.
auth.networkError: Network error or could not reach the backend.
auth.finishNetworkError: Couldn't save your onboarding. You'll need to sign in and have the backend running — but you can still use the local UI.
auth.finishNeedAuth: You need to sign in to save this. You can sign in and come back to this step.
auth.finishSuccess: Profile saved & starter routine ready (from your AI buddy).
auth.fieldBodyConcerns: Other body areas to look after (optional)
auth.placeholderBodyConcerns: e.g. back acne, dry hands — separate with commas
auth.fieldCurrentRoutine: How are you currently caring for your skin? (optional)
auth.placeholderCurrentRoutine: e.g. AM: cleanse + moisturizer + sunscreen; PM: cleanse + retinol 2x/week

footer.tagline: Your skin diary · AI Coach · progress & before/after
footer.disclaimer: DaDiary offers skincare suggestions for reference only and does not replace professional medical advice.
footer.betaContact: Join Beta: sign up for free early access.

disclaimer.ai: This is a reference suggestion based on the photos and information you provide. DaDiary is not a substitute for advice from a dermatologist. If your skin has a serious problem, please see a professional.
disclaimer.aiShort: AI reference suggestion — not a substitute for a dermatologist's advice.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: Sorry, something broke. Please try again — if it keeps happening, reload the page.

pwa.title: Install DaDiary on your home screen
pwa.description: Open faster, works offline — like a tiny skincare app of your own.
pwa.updateDialogLabel: A new DaDiary version is available
pwa.updateDescription: DaDiary has been updated. Reload to get the latest version.
pwa.offlineBanner: You're offline — some features may not work.
pwa.offlineNoticeBody: Some features (photo uploads, AI buddy, saving routines) may not work until you're back online.
pwa.offlineCheckInBody: Uploading check-in photos and getting AI feedback need a connection. You can still prepare your entry and submit it later.

iosInstall.bannerTitle: Install DaDiary on your home screen to use it like an app
iosInstall.bannerDescription: Tap Share → Add to Home Screen
iosInstall.dialogLabel: How to install DaDiary on iPhone
iosInstall.step1: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar (the square with an upward arrow).
iosInstall.step2: Scroll down and choose “Add to Home Screen”.
iosInstall.step3: Tap “Add” — DaDiary will appear like an app on your home screen.

hero.titleGradient: get tips from your AI Coach.
hero.body: DaDiary helps you log skin with photos, see progress visually, and get personalized routine tips — gentle, no pressure.
hero.betaNote: Free during Beta · No credit card required

problem.heading: Skincare shouldn't feel like guesswork
problem.sub: Many people try hard but still can't tell if their routine actually works.

track.title: Hard to track progress
track.desc: Skin changes a little each day — without photos and a diary, it's easy to quit before you see results.

routine.title: Unclear if routine works
routine.desc: You try many products and switch often, but don't know which steps truly help.

change.title: Skin shifts with seasons
change.desc: Humidity, stress, late nights — skin is sensitive and changes; routines are hard to keep steady.

products.title: Too much conflicting advice
products.desc: Social media, friends, doctors — everyone says something different. You need tips that fit your skin and habits.

solution.heading: Smart skin diary — AI Coach by your side
solution.body: DaDiary combines daily photo check-ins with an AI Coach so you see change, understand what works, and adjust gently over time.

points.p1: Quick photo + feeling check-ins — under a minute a day.
points.p2: AI Coach analyzes and suggests routines for your skin type, goals, and products.
points.p3: Progress charts and before/after help you see improvement over weeks and months.
points.p4: Warm, encouraging tone — no judgment, no pressure to be perfect.

mockup.coachSample: Skin looks steadier than last week — keep morning sunscreen going.

features.heading: Everything you need for structured skincare
features.sub: Built for beginners and experienced users — simple, visual, mobile-friendly.

checkIn.title: Quick photo check-in
checkIn.desc: 1–2 photos plus how your skin feels — log in under a minute, easy to keep daily.

coach.title: Personalized AI Coach
coach.desc: Tips from photos, skin type, and routine — explained simply, not a substitute for a dermatologist.

progress.title: Visual progress tracking
progress.desc: Trend charts, streaks, and timeline so you see change week by week.

routine.title: AM/PM routine suggestions
routine.desc: AI starter routine you can edit and tick off daily — know when you've done every step.

cabinet.title: Skincare shelf
cabinet.desc: Track products in use — AI avoids duplicate ingredients and reminds SPF and patch tests.

beforeAfter.title: Before/after compare
beforeAfter.desc: Same angle and light when possible — see real improvement, not just a feeling.

howItWorks.heading: Four simple steps to get started
howItWorks.side: No perfect routine on day one — start gently and your AI Coach adapts to your pace.

s1.title: Get to know your skin
s1.desc: Share skin type, common issues (oil, acne, spots…), and goals — AI understands your context.

s2.title: Check in daily
s2.desc: Photo + how skin feels. The more consistent you are, the better AI reads your trends.

s3.title: Get AI Coach tips
s3.desc: Warm feedback and gentle routine tweaks — from Beginner to Advanced depth.

s4.title: Track progress
s4.desc: Charts, before/after, and shelf — learn what actually works for you.

benefits.heading: Built for local skin and climate needs
benefits.sub: Oily skin, breakouts, humidity, sun spots — DaDiary addresses common challenges with fitting tips.

humid.title: Humid climate friendly
humid.desc: Light, non-clogging suggestions — proper cleanse, oil balance, and comfortable SPF.

oily.title: Oily skin & pores
oily.desc: Track oiliness over time — see which products help balance your skin.

acne.title: Acne & post-acne marks
acne.desc: Check-in photos show if breakouts ease or flare — adjust routine in time.

safe.title: Safe & responsible
safe.desc: Always reminds SPF, patch tests, and seeing a clinician when skin looks unusual.

testimonials.heading: Beta community feedback
testimonials.footnote: Quotes above are sample placeholders — real feedback will appear as Beta expands.

t1.name: Minh Anh
t1.quote: I finally saw less oil after 3 weeks — daily photo check-ins stopped the guesswork.

t2.name: Thu Hà
t2.quote: AI Coach is gentle, no pressure. I love before/after — breakouts clearly eased.

t3.name: Lan Phương
t3.quote: Clear AM/PM routine with daily ticks. The shelf stopped me buying duplicates.

cta.heading: Ready for structured skincare?
cta.body: Join Beta today — full diary, AI Coach, and progress tracking. No perfect routine needed, just start.

betaSignup.heading: Join the Beta waitlist
betaSignup.sub: Leave your email — we'll notify you when Beta expands or new features roll out.
betaSignup.privacy: We only send Beta-related updates. No spam, no sharing with third parties.
betaSignup.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
betaSignup.successBody: Thanks for your interest in DaDiary. We'll reach out when Beta updates are ready.

checkIn.pageSub: Add photos (same angle/light when you can) and tell us how your skin feels. DaDiary replies in the mode you pick (Beginner / Mid / Advanced) — supportive and explainable, not a replacement for medical advice.
checkIn.heroStepPhotoDesc: 1–2 photos (straight + slight angle) help the AI read and compare your skin.
checkIn.heroStepCoachDesc: Your buddy reads your tags + photos and suggests tiny tweaks for today.
checkIn.heroStepSafetyDesc: Sunscreen · patch test · red flags → see a clinician.
checkIn.photoHint: 1–2 photos. Photo 1 straight-on, photo 2 a slight angle — natural light, same spot each day.
checkIn.dropTitle: Drag & drop or tap to choose photos
checkIn.dropHint: PNG · JPG · WebP — up to 2 photos
checkIn.photoEmptyFront: Look straight at the camera in natural light.
checkIn.photoEmptyAngle: Turn slightly to one side — helps the AI read your skin.
checkIn.photoDragHintDesktop: On desktop: drag and drop an image into each slot below.
checkIn.photoErrorEmpty: Empty or unreadable image — pick another file.
checkIn.photoErrorInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or HEIC are supported.
checkIn.photoErrorInvalidTypeShort: Unsupported format (JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC only).
checkIn.photoErrorNetwork: Network error while uploading — check your connection and retry.
checkIn.photoErrorModeration: Image didn't pass safety checks. Try another photo (no filters or sensitive content).
checkIn.photoDropTooMany: Max 2 photos — remove a file or replace one slot at a time.
checkIn.skipModeActiveNotice: You're using no-photo mode. Your check-in will be analyzed from tags and notes.
checkIn.skipModeNeedTagsHint: Pick at least one tag or write a note to submit.
checkIn.skipModeReadyHint: Ready to submit — tap Send today's feelings.
checkIn.skipModeBackendNote: Note: the server still requires at least one photo. Full no-photo mode will work once the backend is updated.
checkIn.skipModeBanner: Tag + notes only mode — no photos needed. The AI will still respond, but it's a bit less precise without a photo.
checkIn.skipBlocking: You opted out of face photos — switch to tag + notes mode to send quickly, or re-enable photo capture from Settings.
checkIn.skipModeNeedTags: Tag + notes mode: pick at least one feeling tag or jot a few words so your buddy has something to read.
checkIn.photoCountHint: Up to 2 photos · first is the thumbnail
checkIn.photoTipsTitle: Tips so your timeline stays comparable
checkIn.photoTipLight: Natural window light — avoid direct flash.
checkIn.photoTipAngle: Photo 1 straight-on + photo 2 slight angle — same distance each day.
checkIn.photoTipClean: Freshly washed skin, no filter or retouching.
checkIn.emptyImageSkipped: Skipped an empty file (0 bytes). Pick a real photo from your library or capture a new one.
checkIn.modeFromOnboarding: Loaded from getting-to-know-your-skin — you can override for today.
checkIn.modeHint: Nothing picked? We default to gentle encouragement + 1–2 concrete tips (Beginner — simple mode).
checkIn.placeholderTitle: e.g. Week 3 BHA, dry season in Hanoi
checkIn.placeholderUserNote: Morning/evening steps, new products, how it feels…
checkIn.placeholderEnv: Weather, AC all day, time outside, sleep…
checkIn.fieldConditions: How your skin feels today (pick any)
checkIn.symptomsHint: Different from “how it feels” — capture sensations or context (e.g. stinging after a new cream).
checkIn.afterSubmit: After you send: photos + notes are saved and your AI buddy responds on this page (may take a few minutes).
checkIn.needImage: Pick at least one skin photo (face or the area you track).
checkIn.success: Check-in sent. Your buddy is reading — a summary will appear when ready.
checkIn.needAuth: You need to sign in to send a check-in (connect auth on the backend for demos).
checkIn.networkError: Could not reach the API (or CORS). Check `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` and the backend — multipart field names are correct.
checkIn.submitErrorNetwork: Couldn't submit — check your connection and try again. Your entries are still here.
checkIn.submitErrorMissingImages: The server doesn't support no-photo check-ins yet. Re-enable photos or try again after a backend update.
checkIn.submitErrorGeneric: Submit failed ({status}): {detail}. You can fix and retry — your data is kept.
checkIn.analyzingCoach: Reading your photos and writing a friendly response — this can take a few minutes. Keep the tab open.
checkIn.coachBeforeSubmit: Send to receive: today's read, routine tweaks, what to ease off, and safety notes.

feedbackLoading.title: Your buddy is preparing feedback
feedbackLoading.submittingSubtitle: Uploading photos and saving how your skin feels today.
feedbackLoading.status1: AI is reading your photos and skin tags…
feedbackLoading.status2: Matching your notes with today's photo read…
feedbackLoading.status4: Checking safety reminders and SPF notes…
feedbackLoading.status5: Almost there — this usually takes 15–60 seconds…
feedbackLoading.savedAnalyzing: Check-in saved successfully. AI is analyzing…
feedbackLoading.slowWarning: AI is taking a little longer than usual — feel free to leave and come back later.
feedbackLoading.keepTabHint: You can leave this tab — your check-in is saved. Come back here or open Progress to see results when ready.
feedbackLoading.timeoutTitle: AI is still working — keep waiting?
feedbackLoading.timeoutBody: Analysis may take a little longer. You can keep waiting or leave and come back later.

coach.title: Today's notes from your buddy
coach.alignment: Your tags vs. soft photo read
coach.processingHint: Usually ready within about a minute. Keep this tab open.
coach.failedUnknown: The reading step didn't work. Try submitting again — if it keeps failing, wait a few minutes.
coach.pollTimeout: Analysis took too long or the server did not respond. Try a new check-in.
coach.rateHint: Your vote helps us improve your buddy.

routineBridge.title: Today's skincare, in one tap
routineBridge.subtitle: Apply the morning/evening ideas above to today's skincare, then tick steps as you do them — without leaving this page.
routineBridge.subtitleNoSuggestion: Today's saved skincare — tick steps as you do them. Tap “Open” to edit.
routineBridge.applyHint: Adds {am} morning · {pm} evening step(s). You can edit anytime.
routineBridge.saveError: Couldn't save your tick. Try again in a moment.
routineBridge.applyError: Couldn't apply. Try again in a moment.
routineBridge.emptyHint: Nothing for today yet. Tap “Apply to today” above, or open the page to start one.
routineBridge.applyConfirmBody: You already have a routine today ({am} morning · {pm} evening steps). Applying the new suggestion will replace all of it with {newAm} morning · {newPm} evening steps.
routineBridge.unapplyError: Couldn't undo — try again in a moment.

productSuggestions.title: Product picks for you
productSuggestions.hint: Matched to today's skin signals — totally optional to buy.
productSuggestions.affiliateNote: Links may earn DaDiary a small commission (affiliate). You're free to shop anywhere.

coachWelcome.title: Your starter routine
coachWelcome.subtitle: Morning/evening steps from your getting-to-know-your-skin answers — friendly, doable, not a substitute for a dermatologist.
coachWelcome.introLine: This is your starter routine — review it and start your first check-in when you're ready.
coachWelcome.routineSectionSub: Follow these steps daily — tick them off in Check-in.
coachWelcome.ctaBlockSub: Daily check-ins help your AI buddy understand your skin over time.
coachWelcome.guestSaveRoutineCta: Sign up to save this routine
coachWelcome.feedbackRoutineTitle: Does this routine feel right for you?
coachWelcome.feedbackRoutineHint: Quick feedback helps DaDiary improve suggestions for you.
coachWelcome.feedbackRoutineHintAfter: Thanks! Add a short note if you'd like (optional).
coachWelcome.feedbackCommentPlaceholder: e.g. morning feels like a lot, or I'd like more calming steps…
coachWelcome.starterGenerating: AI is building your personalized routine…
coachWelcome.starterGeneratingGuestHint: You can preview the temporary version below — it will update automatically when ready 😊
coachWelcome.starterFallbackNotice: You're on the default starter routine for now. You can adjust it anytime!
coachWelcome.empty: No starter data yet. Finish getting-to-know-your-skin while signed in.
coachWelcome.backOnboarding: Back to getting to know your skin
coachWelcome.safety: Safety & when to see a pro
coachWelcome.rateHint: Your vote helps us improve your buddy over time.
coachWelcome.needSignIn: Sign in to see your starter routine from getting-to-know-your-skin.
coachWelcome.guestPreviewHint: This is a preview on your device — nothing is saved to the server yet. Sign up to keep your routine, skin history, and long-term AI memory.
coachWelcome.guestRoutineReadyCta: Your personalized routine is ready! Want to save it and track your skin over time? Sign up for free 😊
coachWelcome.guestRoutineFallbackCta: You're on a temporary default routine. Want one tailored to your skin? Try signing up for free!
coachWelcome.guestSignInExistingCta: Log in if you already have an account
coachWelcome.retryAiRoutineHint: The default routine is still safe — tap to get a personalized version.
coachWelcome.errorFetch: Couldn't load your profile. Please try again.
coachWelcome.errorNetwork: Network hiccup — check your connection and retry.

premium.quotaSuggestTitle: You've used all {limit} AI suggestions this month
premium.quotaSuggestBody: Upgrade to Premium for unlimited AI skincare suggestions.
premium.quotaEditTitle: Routine edit limit reached this month
premium.quotaEditBody: You've used all {limit} manual edits this month — ticking steps still works. Premium allows unlimited edits.
premium.wardrobeBody: Free plan is view-only. Upgrade to Premium to add and edit products in your shelf.

cabinet.title: Products you're using
cabinet.sub: Log your real shelf — your AI buddy skips items you already own when suggesting affiliate picks.
cabinet.listHint: Use accurate name + brand so the buddy can match what you already have.
cabinet.emptyBody: Add your first product on the right — affiliate suggestions won't duplicate what you list here.
cabinet.addSub: Brand name helps the buddy avoid duplicate affiliate picks.
cabinet.placeholderNotes: e.g. AM/PM, patch test 24h before full face
cabinet.brandRequired: Enter a brand — helps the buddy skip duplicates you already own.
cabinet.addError: Couldn't add — try again in a moment.
cabinet.needAuth: Sign in to save your shelf to the server.
cabinet.starterTitle: Starter routine (from getting to know your skin)
cabinet.premiumWardrobeBody: Free plan is view-only. Upgrade to Premium to add and edit products in your shelf.

meMemory.title: What does your buddy remember?
meMemory.sub: This is the text block DaDiary injects into coaching — so you know why advice evolves over time.
meMemory.previewSub: Not a verbatim copy of every coach reply — a summary of profile, recent check-ins, votes and your shelf.
meMemory.emptyMemory: (Not enough data yet — complete getting-to-know-your-skin or check in so the buddy can remember.)
meMemory.footerNote: This data belongs to you. Wipe everything under Privacy & data below or on the Shelf page.
meMemory.needAuth: Sign in to view AI memory.

progress.title: Your skin journey
progress.sub: Compare before–after, track trends by week and month. Consistent check-ins are what make the timeline truly useful.

summary.headlineUp: Overall score is up {pct} vs last month — keep going!
summary.headlineDown: Overall score is slightly down {pct} — let's ease back into a gentler rhythm.
summary.headlineFlat: Overall score is steady — consistency adds up.
summary.noComparisonYet: Not enough data yet — keep checking in.

beforeAfter.title: Before · After
beforeAfter.hint: Comparing the oldest and newest photo in the selected window. Same lighting and angle make the comparison more honest.
beforeAfter.caption: Pick two photos with similar lighting and angle for a more accurate comparison.
beforeAfter.notEnoughBody: You need at least 2 photos to see the change. Check in more to track your skin progress.

entry.failed: Couldn't read the entry — try checking in again.

empty.benefit: After 7–14 days of consistent check-ins, you'll clearly see your skin trend through charts and before/after photos.

first.title: Start your skin journey
first.body: Start tracking your skin today. Just a few seconds a day and you'll clearly see how your skin changes over time.

range.title: No data in this range yet
range.body: There are no check-ins in this time window. Check in to start building your skin history.

errors.needAuth: Please sign in to view your progress.
errors.networkError: Network hiccup — give it another try in a moment.

pendingBanner.title: You have a check-in waiting for AI analysis
pendingBanner.body: AI is analyzing your photos and skin condition.

onboarding.title: Starter routine
onboarding.intro: Three steps — under 90 seconds if you're quick. No comparison, no pressure.

analyze.title: Photos & analysis
analyze.subtitle: Add photos (or skip) — edit your skin picks below, same screen.

photos.title: Face photos for the AI
photos.hint: 2–3 photos: natural light, no makeup. Two angles help the AI read better.
photos.skipShyHint: You can still get a starter routine — the AI will be a little less accurate without photos.
photos.emptyBody: Take or pick at least 2 face photos (max 3), or use the skip button above.
photos.analyzeSubtitle: Usually about 10–20 seconds — stay on this screen.
photos.tipsCompact: Natural light · front or ¾ angle · light filters only.
photos.tipLight: Stand near a window; avoid harsh flash.
photos.tipAngle: One straight-on portrait + one ¾ profile.
photos.needMore: Add one more photo so the AI can read your skin better!
photos.analyzeFail: Reading didn't work. Retry or check backend & OpenAI.
photos.analyzeNeedLogin: Couldn't reach the server or your session expired. Try again — or tap «Skip photos» to pick skin type manually.
photos.skipBody: You're in face-free mode — onboarding still completes, the AI will rely on your skin feelings & habits. You can re-enable photo capture any time in Settings → Privacy.
photos.skipSwitchBack: I changed my mind — re-enable photos

quickInfo.title: Almost there
quickInfo.subtitle: Pick your skill level and one skin goal — two quick groups.

aiReview.title: AI suggestions for you
aiReview.subtitle: Hints from photos — not a medical diagnosis.
aiReview.manualSubtitle: Quick picks — skin type + main concerns. Done in seconds.

barrierValues.possibly_compromised: May feel stressed — go gentle and soothe

onboarding.summarySubtitle: Quick check — then we'll build your AM/PM starter routine.

guestTrial.title: You've used your free trial
guestTrial.body1: You've used your one free onboarding round.
guestTrial.body2: Next time you want saved data, skin history, and long-term AI memory — you gotta sign up.

review.title: You've finished getting to know your skin
review.readOnlyHint: Review mode — you can't take new photos, edit skin info, or rerun onboarding from here.
review.deleteBlocked: You already reset onboarding today ({date}). Try again tomorrow.
review.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete all onboarding information? This cannot be undone and you'll need to start over.
review.deleteSuccess: Onboarding data deleted. You can start fresh now.
review.deleteError: Couldn't delete — try again in a moment.
review.deleteNeedAuth: Sign in to delete server-side data.
review.photosExpired: Photos are no longer available in this session (old tab or after reload). Redo onboarding if you need to see them again.

onboarding.summaryFoot: Daily photos + skin notes make the timeline and your buddy sharper. We won't promise “perfect skin” overnight — just clear progress when you stay consistent.
onboarding.skillHint: Adjusts how detailed wording is in your diary and buddy notes.

steps.typeTitle: Skin type that fits best right now

goal.unsure: Not sure yet — coach me gradually

beginner.title: Beginner (simple mode)
beginner.desc: For total beginners — only the basic steps, plain words, slower pace.

intermediate.title: Mid mode
intermediate.desc: Introduces ingredients & step order; balanced, safety-first tips.

advanced.title: Advanced mode
advanced.desc: Goes deeper on ingredients, product combinations, patch testing.

packLines.skillBeginner0: Safe base: gentle cleanser + moisturizer + sunscreen in the morning (even at home near windows).
packLines.skillBeginner1: Try at most one new ingredient per week — and patch test on a small area first.
packLines.skillIntermediate0: Alternate ingredients (e.g. BHA/PHA at night) — always pair with hydration + soothing when skin feels tight.
packLines.skillIntermediate1: Log routines for 5–7 days to spot patterns; don't change too many products at once.
packLines.skillAdvanced0: Layer with intent; track pH and order for acids/retinol.
packLines.skillAdvanced1: Compare photos with the same lighting/angle before calling something “progress.”
packLines.budgetEntry: Prioritize solid drugstore formulas: pH ~5–6 cleanser, ceramide moisturizer, durable sunscreen over pricey serums.
packLines.budgetMid: Invest in one targeted serum + one calming moisturizer; keep the rest minimal.
packLines.budgetFlexible: You can shift budget toward treatments / quality sunscreen + a lean toolkit.

onboarding.goalCoachLine: Focus: {goal} — your buddy explains “why” before “what to buy.”
onboarding.contextCoachLine: Context: {contexts} — tips will mention sunscreen / cleansing / recovery for your lifestyle.

aiLoading.analyzeTime0: AI is analyzing your skin photos…
aiLoading.analyzeTime10: Reading skin type, undertone, and common concerns…
aiLoading.analyzeTime25: Putting it together and preparing suggestions…
aiLoading.analyzeTime40: Finishing the analysis — just a little longer…
aiLoading.slowHint: AI is taking a bit longer than usual…
aiLoading.routineTitle: AI is building your starter routine…
aiLoading.routineTime0: Picking AM/PM steps that fit your skin…
aiLoading.routineTime8: Balancing safety and your skin goal…
aiLoading.routineTime20: Writing gentle notes for your first week…
aiLoading.routineTime35: Almost there — hang on a moment…
aiLoading.progressHint: AI is working — please keep this screen open.
aiLoading.timeoutFriendly: You can try again or pick your skin type manually — your photos are still saved.
aiLoading.manualSkinBannerTitle: You're picking your skin type manually
aiLoading.manualSkinBannerBody: Results may be less accurate than AI analysis. Your photos are kept — you can try AI again anytime.

errors.timeout: AI took too long (over 45 seconds). Try again or choose another option below.
errors.network: Connection looks unstable. Check your network and try again.
errors.auth: Your session expired or the server isn't ready. Retry or pick manually.
errors.server: AI isn't responding right now. Try again in a few seconds.
errors.generic: Something didn't work. Retry or use a fallback option below.

routine.pageSub: Build a rhythm that fits your skin and tick steps as you do them.
routine.carriedBadge: Carried over from your last entry — save to apply for today
routine.sourceSavedTodayHint: Today's routine is saved — ticking and edits update this version.
routine.sourceCarriedSubtitle: This routine was brought forward from a previous day — tap Save to apply it for today.
routine.sourceCarriedHint: These steps come from your most recent saved routine. You can still tick completion; tap Save when you want to lock it in for today.
routine.sourceOnboardingSeed: Started from your first skincare plan
routine.sourceOnboardingSubtitle: This routine comes from when you got to know your skin — adjust it, then tap Save.
routine.sourceOnboardingHint: This is the AM/PM rhythm suggested after onboarding. Add, remove, or rename steps before saving for today.
routine.sourceAiHint: AI suggested this rhythm — tweak if needed, then tap Save to apply for today.
routine.aiSuggestedBadge: AI suggested — edit if needed then tap Save
routine.modeHint: Beginner: simple 3-step routine. Mid/Advanced: fuller, profile-aware.
routine.modeBeginnerHint: Simple mode is on — just step titles and a tick to mark done. The rest is hidden so it stays calm.
routine.emptyHeroBody: Add a few morning or evening steps below — save and tick them off each day.
routine.emptyHeroBeginnerBody: Tap a section below to add your first step — just a name and a tick when you're done.
routine.emptyHeroScrollHint: Scroll down to add morning or evening steps
routine.notesPlaceholder: How skin feels today, products you're trialing…
routine.saveError: Could not save. Try again in a moment.
routine.loadError: Could not load your routine. Refresh the page or check your connection.
routine.emptyBody: Add a few morning or evening steps to get started.
routine.emptySectionHint: Tap to add a step — name it, then tick when you've done it.
routine.emptySectionBeginnerHint: Just a step name and a completion tick — keep it simple.
routine.aiSuggestBody: DaDiary reads your skin profile + most recent check-in and drafts a morning/evening rhythm. Preview, edit, then save — nothing is overwritten without you.
routine.aiSuggestError: Couldn't reach AI. Try again or check your connection.
routine.aiSuggestLoadingSubtitle: AI is analyzing your skin and crafting a matching AM/PM rhythm…
routine.aiSuggestFailed: AI hit an error while building your routine. Please try again shortly.
routine.aiSuggestTimeout: AI took a bit too long. Would you like to try again?
routine.aiSuggestExpired: This suggestion session expired (over 15 min). Tap Retry to start a new one.
routine.aiSuggestNetwork: Your network connection seems unstable. Please check and try again.
routine.aiSuggestToastCompleted: AI finished your routine. Review the preview below and apply if you like it!
routine.aiSuggestToastResumed: Picking up where we left off — still waiting for AI…
routine.quotaSuggestExceeded: You've used all {limit} AI suggestions this month. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited access.
routine.quotaEditExceeded: You've used all {limit} manual edits this month — ticking steps still works. Premium allows unlimited edits.
routine.editLockedHint: Free plan: view and tick completion only. To edit steps, upgrade to Premium or use remaining manual edits.
routine.aiFocusPlaceholder: e.g. skin feels tight, prefer a gentle routine
routine.aiPreviewHint: Edit in the form above before saving — you're always the one in control.
routine.historyHint: Track how complete each day was — consistency matters more than perfection.
routine.historyEmpty: Save a few days to see your streak appear here.
routine.historyTapHint: Tap a day to see its steps.
routine.historyDetailEmpty: No steps were saved for this day.
routine.historyEditLocked: Upgrade to Premium or use manual edits to change routines.
routine.unsavedHint: You have unsaved changes — tap Save to apply for today.
routine.cleanHint: All changes saved. Tick each step as you finish it.
routine.validateNoSteps: Add at least 1 step before saving.
routine.validateNoStepsBeginner: Add at least 1 step to save.
routine.validateNoTitle: A step is missing a name — fill it in or remove it.
routine.validateNoTitleBeginner: Fill in the step name or remove the empty step.
routine.validateSpfMissingBeginner: Add sunscreen to your morning routine.

checkInContext.cardSubtitle: Your logged skin state — today's routine suggestions build on this.
checkInContext.title: From your latest check-in
checkInContext.subtitle: Track your skin via your latest check-in — update it on the check-in page.
checkInContext.applySuccess: Applied suggestions from your skin journal.
checkInContext.applyHintsEmpty: This check-in has no routine suggestions yet.
checkInContext.applyHintsError: Couldn't apply suggestions. Try again in a moment.
checkInContext.applyLocked: Manual edit limit reached — upgrade to Premium to apply suggestions.
checkInContext.applyBeginner: Beginner mode — switch to Intermediate to apply suggestions.
checkInContext.confirmBody: You have unsaved changes. Applying new suggestions will replace your current AM/PM steps.
checkInContext.detailHintsHighlight: You can apply these directly to today's routine.
checkInContext.detailNoHints: This check-in has no routine step suggestions.
checkInContext.emptyHint: Add a quick photo + a few skin tags so the suggestions match how your skin actually feels today.
checkInContext.errorHint: Your routine suggestions may be less accurate until this loads.

privacy.dialogTitle: Before you take a photo — a few promises
privacy.dialogIntro: We want you to feel comfortable and know exactly what happens to your photos.
privacy.dialogBullet1: We only use photos to analyze your skin.
privacy.dialogBullet2: Photos are sent securely for AI skin analysis.
privacy.dialogBullet3: Photos are stored on our servers for analysis — you can delete everything in Settings.
privacy.dialogBullet4: You can wipe all your data any time from Settings.
privacy.dialogDecline: I'd rather not photograph my face

captureCard.title: Take or choose a photo
captureCard.subtitle: Photos are uploaded for AI skin analysis — review them before submitting.
captureCard.skipCta: I'd rather not photograph my face
captureCard.skipHint: DaDiary still works with just tags + notes — the AI will be a bit less precise.

privacy.settingsSub: You decide what DaDiary knows about your skin. The four promises below apply to both Onboarding and the daily check-in.
privacy.modeStatusFresh: Photos are used for skin analysis — see the privacy promises below.
privacy.deleteRowSub: Remove uploaded photos, check-in history, skin profile and saved routines. This can't be undone.
privacy.deleteConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to wipe everything?
privacy.deleteConfirmBody: This cannot be undone. We will permanently remove from the server:
privacy.deleteAccountKept: Your login account stays — only skincare data is removed.
privacy.deleteSuccess: Local data on this device is cleared.
privacy.deleteSuccessServer: All server data deleted. You'll be redirected to sign in.
privacy.deleteAuth: Session expired — sign in again if you still need to delete.
privacy.deleteNetwork: Couldn't delete on the server — check your connection and retry.
privacy.memoryLinkSub: See the memory block used in coaching — transparent and refreshable.

feedback.rateTitle: Did this feel right for you?
feedback.rateHint: One tap — your vote helps us tailor your buddy over time.
feedback.rateHintAfterVote: Thanks — add a quick reason if you'd like, so your buddy learns faster.
feedback.helpfulAria: Mark this AI suggestion as helpful
feedback.notHelpfulAria: Mark this AI suggestion as not helpful
feedback.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. tone felt clinical, or BHA too strong for sensitive skin…
feedback.reasonThanks: Got it — your buddy will adjust over time.
feedback.error: Couldn't send feedback. Try again in a moment.

appFeedback.pageSub: Your input helps us improve the AI Coach, fix bugs, and prioritize features during Beta.
appFeedback.commentPlaceholder: Describe your feedback, bug, or feature idea in detail…
appFeedback.privacy: Your feedback is only used to improve DaDiary. We do not share it with third parties.
appFeedback.error: Could not send feedback. Please try again.

adminFeedbacks.title: User feedback inbox
adminFeedbacks.sub: Track Beta feedback — filter by type and status, update directly from the table.
adminFeedbacks.needAuth: Sign in to access the admin page.
adminFeedbacks.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.
adminFeedbacks.empty: No feedback matches the current filters.
